title: Deploy: api-gateway v2.4.1 to production
text: Deployed api-gateway version 2.4.1 to production. Includes rate limit improvements.

title: Deploy: auth-service v3.1.0 to production
text: Deployed auth-service v3.1.0. Adds TOTP MFA support and session token rotation.

title: Monitor Alert: High API p95 Latency - RESOLVED
text: API p95 latency exceeded 800ms for 3 minutes. Auto-resolved after traffic spike subsided.

title: Deploy: professional-service v1.8.2 to staging
text: Deployed professional-service v1.8.2 to staging for QA validation.

title: DB Maintenance: PostgreSQL vacuum on MCWC Chronic Pain Program_prod
text: Scheduled VACUUM ANALYZE completed on MCWC Chronic Pain Program_prod. Table bloat reduced by 12%.

title: Deploy: pain-pacing-app v1.3.0 to production
text: Deployed pain-pacing-app v1.3.0. New outdoor activity pacing module added.

title: Security: Failed login spike - RESOLVED
text: 120 failed login attempts in 5 minutes from IP range 185.220.x.x. Cloudflare firewall rule triggered.

title: Deploy: MCWC Chronic Pain Program-web v4.2.0 to production
text: Deployed MCWC Chronic Pain Program-web v4.2.0. Updated occupational therapist cohort intake steps.

title: Infra: Redis cache restart on cache-01
text: Redis cache-01 restarted after memory pressure event. Cache warmed in 4 minutes.

title: Deploy: mobile-api v2.1.4 to production
text: Deployed mobile-api v2.1.4. Fixes iOS session timeout bug and adds Android offline mode.

title: DB Alert: Slow query on professional_sessions table - RESOLVED
text: Query on professional_sessions.participant_id took 4.2s. Added index. Resolved.

title: Deploy: notification-service v1.4.1 to production
text: Deployed notification-service v1.4.1. Fixes email bounce handling and adds retry logic.

title: SSL Certificate Renewed: finthesiss.ai
text: TLS certificate for finthesiss.ai auto-renewed via Let's Encrypt. Valid for 90 days.

title: Deploy: search-service v1.2.0 to staging
text: Deployed search-service v1.2.0 to staging. New professional content ranking algorithm.

title: Infra: web-02 memory usage spike - RESOLVED
text: web-02 memory reached 94%. Rolling restart of app processes resolved the leak.

title: Deploy: professional-service v1.8.1 to production
text: Deployed professional-service v1.8.1. privacy audit log improvements and performance fixes.

title: Monitor: Bitterroot Rehab website brief downtime - RESOLVED
text: bitterrootrehab.com was unreachable for 8 minutes due to upstream provider issue. Resolved.

title: Deploy: api-gateway v2.4.0 to production
text: Deployed api-gateway v2.4.0. Added occupational therapist endpoint auth scopes.

title: Security: CDN cache poisoning attempt blocked
text: Cloudflare detected and blocked cache poisoning attempt on cdn.finthesiss.ai. No data exposed.

title: Deploy: pain-pacing-app v1.2.5 to production
text: Deployed pain-pacing-app v1.2.5. Bug fix for activity diary sync on low-bandwidth connections.
